message:
fix(doom): clamp light-scaled RGB channels to prevent overflow

The draw_column_shaded method could produce values > 255 when the
light multiplier exceeded 1.0 (e.g., overbright surfaces), causing
silent truncation on the u8 cast. Add .min(255.0) clamp before the
cast to guarantee correct color capping.

Also adds out-of-bounds safety tests for draw_column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
